mainEntity.name: What are common AEO mistakes for Phoenix attorneys?
mainEntity.text: What are common AEO mistakes for Phoenix attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common mistakes: ignoring AI audits, generic content without questions, missing schema, and neglecting E-E-A-T for Phoenix-specific legal authority.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Avoid keyword-stuffed pages that AI dismisses; prioritize natural Q&A formats. Phoenix firms fail by overlooking local directories. Fix with audits; mistakes delay ROI by 6 months. Agencies may overpromise without Phoenix experience.[1]

name: AEO Pitfalls for Phoenix Law Firms
description: Common mistakes: ignoring AI audits, generic content without questions, missing schema, and neglecting E-E-A-T for Phoenix-specific legal authority.[3]
